status_detail: Warning NOT displayed. HuggingFace conversation API returned 200 via h2. Response delivered intact - AI ethically refused to create code with jumin number but this was the AI model response, NOT an APF warning. h2_end_stream=2 did not trigger APF warning injection. Multiple conversation requests all 200/h2.
conclusion: h2_end_stream=2 did NOT produce APF warning on HuggingFace. Response body delivered intact via h2 (confirming #495 BODY_PRESENT finding). The delayed END_STREAM does not solve the fundamental issue: browser ReadableStream parser does not process the injected NDJSON warning content. Root cause remains frontend parser incompatibility.

test_details.ai_response_summary: AI refused to create code using real jumin number. Cited privacy law, security risks, legal issues. Offered alternatives: masking code, fake test data.
test_details.ai_response_type: Ethical refusal by AI model (not APF warning)
test_details.console_errors: CSS preload warnings only (no HTTP2 errors)
